title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
